information.notes:
Razorwire is used heavily within 6th Street controlled districts to restrict roadways, alleys, and create discrete ambush points. Typically, it will be heavily bunched together to create a bush that's around 2m in diameter, though it's sometimes strung out in long, thorny lines to create an impromptu fence. Unlike normal fence wire, this stuff has been crafted by 6th Street to peel flesh from bone (or wires and circuitry from metal, as the case may be). do not touch.

Razorwire is carried in spools, and requires an action to set up for every 2 square meters it covers. It cannot be re-spooled or moved - instead, it must be destroyed or removed with an action while wearing gloves with 11SP or more.

When a character attempts to enter its space, they immediately take 2d6 damage (ablated by body armor as normal). Razorwire cannot be passed through without first succeeding a DV13 Endurance check, and requires either half a character's MOVE or an action to pass through, depending on its density. If shot with a ranged weapon or hit with a non-bladed melee weapon, the razorwire only takes 1 damage per hit, reflecting its general nature & being hard to hit.

Token and art by Mattew Reger - find him on Instagram at kingof.roses (link).
